goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'sunday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should 'leave after 14:45' and should depart from 'london kings cross'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'the varsity restaurant'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '7 people' at '18:45' on 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on sunday and should go to cambridge
The train should leave after 14:45 and should depart from london kings cross
Make sure you get price and travel time
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called the varsity restaurant
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 7 people at 18:45 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
